page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The underlying processor is an Intel Xeon 6462C running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. The instance features 1.0 thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyper-threading overhead.

The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, which facilitates high-throughput data transfers between instances and cloud services.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring substantial RAM without the need for local NVMe drives. It is suitable for memory-intensive applications, enterprise databases, in-memory caching systems, and data processing pipelines that benefit from a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr8i.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6462C processor clocked at 3.3 GHz with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, in-memory databases, and large-scale data processing tasks that require dedicated compute resources and high network throughput.
